problems_encountered.description: publicKey is required. The library version requires an existing public key to import, it does not generate keys locally. This differs from the CLI tool which can generate keys.

tool_response_summary: Tool execution failed with validation error. The MCP tool requires a publicKey parameter and does not support local key generation like the CLI version does.
execution_notes: Tool implementation differs from CLI behavior - requires pre-existing public key instead of generating new keys. This is an expected limitation of the library-based implementation. Users should use ssh-key-import instead for adding existing keys.
